actionUnits.condition: TeleportPlayer (script_fileID 692630298, guid 9469e5ef7ce252d48a689ad38d7b5695) uses provider fileID 692630299 and anchor fileID 1702822959. Calling Teleport() should create a TeleportRequest from anchor.teleportAnchorTransform and queue it via TeleportationProvider.QueueTeleportRequest.

OnButtonPress (script_fileID 692630297, guid 4a8d337e8bc7ac4498e0df29e7b8bd5e) has InputAction bound to <XRController>{LeftHand}/secondaryButton and <XRController>{RightHand}/secondaryButton. OnPress UnityEvent has a persistent call (m_Calls) to LoadScene.ReloadCurrentScene on target script fileID 1907113017; OnRelease has no calls. Manually invoke the persistent call to simulate the button press event when input isn't available.
